transitions.root_rule: preserve current root unless the recipe explicitly transfers to seat, mark, or target root
transitions.contact_rule: lock current support until the authored transfer marker; never interpolate through an unsupported contact
transitions.staff_rule: preserve hand attachment; planted tips release or acquire only at declared staff markers
transitions.wing_rule: preserve continuity and settle secondary motion; serious/reduced modes suppress repeated flap
transitions.mouth_rule: speech-owned mouth remains independent; generation replacement closes before new timing begins
transitions.gaze_rule: blend only between validated targets; correction/breaking returns gaze to camera
transitions.expression_rule: face channel may coarticulate but serious-state clamps override positive/zany accents
transitions.effect_rule: effects stop on interruption; approved graphics remain owned by Joe Newsroom
transitions.restoration: generation-checked return to previous valid semantic family; otherwise anchor_neutral_front

transitions.joe_timing_relationship: Show director supplies start/stop/interrupt time; actor engine quantizes to its fixed tick and reports applied tick
transitions.reduced_motion_fallback: direct settle or opacity-only shot change within 160 ms; no root glide or repeated secondary motion

transitions.root_rule: preserve current root unless the recipe explicitly transfers to seat, mark, or target root
transitions.contact_rule: lock current support until the authored transfer marker; never interpolate through an unsupported contact
transitions.staff_rule: preserve hand attachment; planted tips release or acquire only at declared staff markers
transitions.wing_rule: preserve continuity and settle secondary motion; serious/reduced modes suppress repeated flap
transitions.mouth_rule: speech-owned mouth remains independent; generation replacement closes before new timing begins
transitions.gaze_rule: blend only between validated targets; correction/breaking returns gaze to camera
transitions.expression_rule: face channel may coarticulate but serious-state clamps override positive/zany accents
transitions.effect_rule: effects stop on interruption; approved graphics remain owned by Joe Newsroom
transitions.restoration: generation-checked return to previous valid semantic family; otherwise anchor_neutral_front
